index.title: Transactional sending
index.description: Issue a scoped API key and integrate the transactional endpoint.

domainAlert.title: A verified sending domain is required
domainAlert.description: Transactional sends will fail until at least one sending domain is verified. Verify a domain under Sending Domains first.

endpoint.title: Endpoint reference
endpoint.description: Send transactional mail by calling this endpoint with the API key above as a Bearer token.
endpoint.templateNotePrefix: Each request must reference an existing
endpoint.templateNoteSuffix: template by id and a verified sending domain id.
endpoint.errorNoteQuota: when the workspace has used its plan's send allowance, or
endpoint.errorNoteSuspended: when the account is suspended for non-payment. Check

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.restrictedDescription: You do not have permission to issue or revoke API keys in this workspace.
apiKeys.copyNowDescription: This secret is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later. If you lose it, revoke the key and issue a new one.
apiKeys.emptyMessage: Issue an API key to integrate transactional sending.
apiKeys.confirmRevokeDescription: Any integration using this key will immediately stop working.

issueDialog.title: Issue a transactional API key
issueDialog.descriptionSuffix: . Its secret is shown once after it is created.
